title: Senior Frontend Developer at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the PharmEasy Ventures Solutions family as a Frontend Developer in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PharmEasy Ventures Solutions:
PharmEasy Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy Ventures Solutions!
